---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Turmites"
date: 2020-06-20
trailer: "gallery/turmite/preview/turmite_12.png"
splash:
  image: "gallery/turmite/image/turmite_12.png"
  caption: "Turmites"
---

<style>
.splash-caption-tweak{
  color: #353;
  letter-spacing: 12px;
}
</style>

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

"From little things big things grow" (Paul Kelly, Kev Carmody)

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
